subcodes.first_line: O thou melodious bird in the gardens of divine knowledge! By thy life, with utmost ardor and yearning do I experience a longing that cannot be endured [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الطیر المغرد فی حدائق العرفان لعمرک اننی بکل وجد و اشواق و حنین لایطاق
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
